title: Add Tasks
description: Add PAP.fr search URLs as tasks for scraping French real estate listings

content.introduction: Add PAP.fr (Particulier a Particulier) search URLs to your squid for scraping French private real estate listings. PAP is a French platform for direct owner-to-buyer property transactions without agents. The scraper extracts property details including price, location, energy ratings, and contact information.

taskFormat.title: Task Format
taskFormat.content: Each task should contain a URL from a PAP.fr search results page. You can search for properties by location, type, and filters on PAP, then use those search URLs as tasks.

supportedUrls.title: Supported URL Formats
supportedUrls.content: The scraper supports PAP.fr search URLs from various property categories:
list: Filtered searches with price range, property type, size, etc.

proTips.content: PAP.fr is for private sales (particulier a particulier), meaning you deal directly with owners rather than agencies. This can mean more negotiation flexibility.
PAP URLs use department codes (e.g., 'ain-01' for Ain department). Apply location filters on the website to get the correct URL format.

seo.title: Add Tasks - PAP Search Export - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add PAP.fr search URLs as tasks for scraping French private real estate listings with price, energy ratings, and contact details.
